testcase.name: test_dashboard_requires_auth
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_analytics.py:59: in test_dashboard_requires_auth assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
